Most of the farms comply with the rules.
The average score is 78 out of 100.
Hi Carlos. How many criteria are in the checklist?
There are 82 criteria in total. Eleven of them are critical.
And do most of the farms comply?
Yes. Most farms comply, but a few farms are missing some documents.
Did any farm fail the audit?
None of the farms failed completely. The average score is 78 out of 100.
Great result. How many farms score above 70 percent?
Some farms are above 70 percent, and several are close to full compliance.
There are 82 criteria in total.

Let me read the numbers of my checklist. The Impact checklist has eighty-two criteria in total. Eleven of them are critical. Last month, my team checked forty farms in my region. Most of the farms comply with the rules. A few farms do not have all the documents yet. None of the farms failed completely. Some farms score above seventy percent, and several farms are close to full compliance. The average score is seventy-eight out of one hundred. These numbers help me write a clear report for the team in Geneva.

Hi Carlos, this is Emma with two questions about the data. First, how many criteria are critical? I remember it is a small number. Second, do most of the farms comply, or only a few? I want the average score for the report, out of one hundred. Please send me the total number of farms too. If none of them failed, that is very good news. Thank you, Carlos. Your numbers are always clear.

First, Carlos opens the Impact checklist. There are eighty-two criteria in total. Eleven of them are critical. Most of the farms comply with the rules. Only a few farms are missing documents. The average score is seventy-eight out of one hundred.
